events.title: coronary artery disease
events.event_summary: Problem-oriented bundle for coronary artery disease.
planned_actions: The doctor ordered a physical exam.
A lipid panel will be ordered.
The patient will start crestor 20 mg once a day.
The patient will continue on aspirin.
The patient will continue on toprol.
care_context: The patient has a history of coronary artery disease.
The patient has known coronary artery disease.
The patient reports feeling a burning sensation in their chest.
The patient states the chest pain is not severe.
The patient reports shortness of breath.

key_slots.bundle_concepts: coronary artery disease; chest pain; shortness of breath; burning sensation; nasal congestion; physical exam; lipid panel; crestor; aspirin; toprol
key_slots.history_context: The patient has a history of coronary artery disease.; The patient has known coronary artery disease.
key_slots.assessment_fallback: The patient has coronary artery disease.
